# PERF-009 negative: url.Parse hoisted out of the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-009-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"strings"
)

func FetchAll(raws []string) ([]int, error) {
	parsed := make([]*url.URL, 0, len(raws))
	for _, raw := range raws {
		raw = strings.TrimSpace(raw)
		parsed = append(parsed, &url.URL{Scheme: "https", Host: "example.com", Path: raw})
	}
	statuses := make([]int, 0, len(parsed))
	for _, u := range parsed {
		resp, err := http.Get(u.String())
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		statuses = append(statuses, resp.StatusCode)
		resp.Body.Close()
	}
	return statuses, nil
}
